title: eleocharis triangulata
intro: Eleocharis triangulata, also known as Three-angled Spike-rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to various parts of the world, including Asia and North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis triangulata include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as alleviating symptoms of fever and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal purposes.
